title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at My Home Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at My Home Group
jsonLd.description:
My Home Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About My Home Group:
My Home Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with My Home Group!
